change_comments.message: this seems to be a duplicate. if it was to be a patch, use "git commit --amend" when submitting a patch to an already raised review.

two files have to be modified https://gerrit.onap.org/r/c/policy/api/+/140252  has one file this has second file. on same code base I did following commands.
1) git add

2) git commit -m ""

3) git commit -s --amend
Issue-ID: POLICY-5289
Change-Id: I38d158446084f2822cefb6499b5b710f47e27e84
Signed-off-by: gururajarao79 <gb00566633@techmahindra.com>

4) git push origin HEAD:refs/for/master

do i need to use git review command?
yeah, git review is preferred. But I see now that is a different file. would still be better if they were modified in the same review. for these changes, api doesn't depend on the change in models.
